title: senecio retortus
intro: Senecio retortus, also known as Round-headed Groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio retortus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Senecio retortus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies.
